title: salvia × palmeri
intro: Salvia × palmeri, also known as Palmer's sage or Palmer's salvia, is a hybrid of the Salvia leucophylla and Salvia farinacea plant species. This perennial herb is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system. The health benefits of Salvia × palmeri include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Salvia × palmeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote relaxation and support overall well-being.
